characters.appearance: Young adult male with a medium build and tan complexion. He has short, spiky black hair and dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a beige and white plaid button-down shirt over a white t-shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Maine apni English speaking ko din ke sirf paanch minute diye. [I gave my English speaking just five minutes a day.]
Character A says: Aur do hafte baad result dekho. [And look at the result after two weeks.]
Character A says: Mujhe lagta tha fluent English bolne ke liye saalo ki classes lagengi. [I used to think speaking fluent English would take years of classes.]
Character A says: Phir samajh aaya ki problem grammar nahi, sirf practice ki kami thi. [Then I realized the problem wasn't grammar, just a lack of practice.]
Character A says: Din ke sirf paanch minute, jitna time hum reels scroll karne mein nikal dete hain. [Just five minutes a day, the time we spend scrolling reels.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by contrasting a small time investment (5 mins) with a big result (2 weeks).
- Relates to the common misconception that fluency takes years of grammar classes.
- Establishes a relatable, practical tone by comparing the effort to scrolling reels.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
finally used my screen time for good by improving my English speaking
MAINE APNI ENGLISH SPEAKING KO DIN KE SIRF 5 MINUTE DIYE. AUR 2 HAFTE BAAD RESULT DEKHO.
MUJHE LAGTA THA FLUENT ENGLISH BOLNE KE LIYE SAALO KI CLASSES LAGENGI.
PHIR SAMAJH AAYA KI PROBLEM GRAMMAR NAHI, SIRF PRACTICE KI KAMI THI.
DIN KE SIRF 5 MINUTE, JITNA TIME HUM REELS SCROLL KARNE MEIN NIKAL DETE HAIN.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Dekho, main bas app open karta hoon, ek lesson chunta hoon, aur bolna shuru karta hoon. [Look, I just open the app, pick a lesson, and start speaking.]
Character A says: Iska AI tutor mujhe turant batata hai ki main kahan galti kar raha hoon. [Its AI tutor instantly tells me where I am making a mistake.]
Character A says: I want to apply for this job. [I want to apply for this job.]
[music only, no speech]
Character A says: Chalo, ek baar aur try karte hain. [Let's try it one more time.]
Character A says: I want to apply for this job. [I want to apply for this job.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's ease of use and core AI tutor feature.
- Shows a real-world, practical speaking scenario (job application) relevant to the target audience.
- Highlights the immediate feedback and improvement loop.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
finally used my screen time for good by improving my English speaking
DEKHO, MAIN BAS APP OPEN KARTA HOON, EK LESSON CHUNTA HOON, AUR BOLNA SHURU KARTA HOON.
ISKA AI TUTOR MUJHE TURANT BATATA HAI KI MAIN KAHAN GALTI KAR RAHA HOON.
I WANT TO APPLY FOR THIS JOB.
CHALO, EK BAAR AUR TRY KARTE HAIN.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Do hafte baad, mere office mein sabne notice kiya. [After two weeks, everyone in my office noticed.]
Character A says: Mujhe koi fake accent nahi chahiye, bas bina atke apni baat rakhni hai. [I don't want a fake accent, I just want to express myself without hesitating.]
Character A says: Aur sabse achhi baat, isme din ke sirf paanch minute lagte hain. [And the best part, it only takes five minutes of your day.]
Character A says: Aaj hi Supernova app download karo. [Download the Supernova app today.]
Character A says: English bolne ke liye ghanto nahi, bas sahi practice chahiye. [To speak English, you don't need hours, just the right practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff: gaining respect and confidence at the workplace.
- Reassures the user that the goal is clear communication, not pretending to be someone else.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging Call to Action to download Supernova.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
finally used my screen time for good by improving my English speaking
DO HAFTE BAAD, MERE OFFICE MEIN SABNE NOTICE KIYA.
MUJHE KOI FAKE ACCENT NAHI CHAHIYE, BAS BINA ATKE APNI BAAT RAKHNI HAI.
AUR SABSE ACHHI BAAT, ISME DIN KE SIRF 5 MINUTE LAGTE HAIN.
AAJ HI SUPERNOVA APP DOWNLOAD KARO.
ENGLISH BOLNE KE LIYE GHANTO NAHI, BAS SAHI PRACTICE CHAHIYE.
